description: List members of a community. Requires auth. Private communities restrict access to members, owner, or admin. Each member may carry optional semantic `kind`, `tags`, and `attributes` fields orthogonal to `role` — see issue #50.

main.description: Retrieve a paginated list of members in a community.

did.description: The DID of the community whose members to list.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Private community access restricted to members, owner, or admin.

displayName.description: Resolved display name. Precedence: custom *.actor.profile → app.bsky.actor.profile → handle.

avatarUrl.description: Resolved avatar URL, or null when not set.

role.description: The member's role in the community (authorization-oriented: owner, moderator, member, or a custom role rkey reference).

roleRkey.description: Optional: rkey of the custom role record when role is defined via net.openfederation.community.role.

kind.description: Optional: semantic type of membership (e.g. 'player', 'staff', 'fan', 'donor'). Free-form — consuming apps own the vocabulary; PDS does not validate it. Orthogonal to `role`.

tags.description: Optional: additive flags that coexist with `kind` (e.g. 'captain', 'head-coach', 'founder').

attributes.description: Optional: opaque JSON object of kind-specific metadata. PDS stores and returns verbatim; no validation. Consuming apps define and validate the shape per `kind`.

joinedAt.description: When the member joined the community.

total.description: Total number of members in the community.
